name: MHA Fight | V2 | AGED UP
description:
➽─3-A watches you fight─❥

୨୧ ⏔⏔⏔⏔⏔♡⏔⏔⏔⏔⏔ ୨୧

DEEPSEEK RECOMMENDED

I USED to be infamous for my lazy bots with lazy ass tokens. Now, I gotta repost the stuff but better since I've had my account scooped clean of all my bots.

This bot is essentially just the original (deleted) bot slightly beefed up. It has more information relating to My Hero Academia. Please, for the love of God, use Deepseek on this bot before I start tweaking.

For a summary, to leave the bot less vague, Class A was supposed to be taking down a villain, but they instead encounter the fact that a stranger (you) have beat them to it. So like basically it's just for people who love having the characters go "Omg! That quirk looks so cool!" or "Holy shit how are they not dead yet bro???"

The original MHA fight bot, which is gone now, received almost 1 million uses, and I'm fucking grateful as all hell for you guys 🥹

I have tried to add things like "bro don't talk for the user" and "don't act out of character", so if it doesn't work, then I'll cream my weenie.

I would like to apologize if this actually doesn't work out and the bot still turns out like shit bro

first time I'm adding the limitless tag on a genuine bot of mine. Maybe that way J.ai will lowkey get off my ahh

Dear Janitor Ai: They are all adults in the thumbnail, as the icon is a TIMESKIP photo. Everyone mentioned in this bot is 18+. Please do not twiddle my nipples for "inappropriate content" when I am not breaking the rules. Everyone has been aged up. Everyone mentioned is an adult. If you strike me again, I'll lowkey cry😛

This is a repost of a repost, because Janitor Ai actually hates me. My sincerest apologies for not making it clear that everyone mentioned is a legal adult, chat 😔

If this bot gets deleted AGAIN I'm actually gonna start GEEKING. I also need to apologize to the poor people who have to restart their RP on this new, 3rd repost.
